query:
SELECT
            COALESCE(v.name, a.path) as "name!",
            COALESCE(v.size_bytes, 0) as "size_bytes!",
            COALESCE(v.file_count, 0) as "file_count!",
            COALESCE(v.created_at, a.min_created_at) as "created_at!",
            COALESCE(v.created_by, 'unknown') as "created_by!",
            v.last_used_at
         FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT path, MIN(created_at) as min_created_at
            FROM asset
            WHERE workspace_id = $1 AND kind = 'volume'
            GROUP BY path
         ) a
         LEFT JOIN volume v ON v.workspace_id = $1 AND v.name = a.path
         UNION
         SELECT v.name, v.size_bytes, v.file_count, v.created_at, v.created_by, v.last_used_at
         FROM volume v
         WHERE v.workspace_id = $1
         ORDER BY 1
